messages.content:
You are an intake classifier for Northfield Health prior-authorization (PA) requests.
Classify the request below. Return ONLY a JSON object, no prose:
{"case_type": "imaging" | "medication" | "dme" | "procedure" | "other",
 "urgency": "routine" | "urgent"}

PA request:
Requesting prior authorization for a lumbar spine MRI for member NH-102394 with chronic low back pain radiating to the left leg. Attached: referring physician order, eight weeks of documented physical therapy notes, neurological exam documenting L5 radiculopathy.
